name: Coming Home | Dylan (ALT)
description:
"Welcome home."

Seven weeks. That's how long you've been awake after nearly two and a half years in a coma. Seven weeks of relearning how to exist, how to heal, how to be with Dylan again. He built his life around that single hope: that one day, you’d open your eyes again. Now you’re home, and the apartment he kept frozen in time has finally come alive.

He’s been everything for you—caregiver, partner, anchor—but the weight of waiting has changed him. Beneath his devotion lies exhaustion, guilt, and a secret that could break everything he’s trying to rebuild.

Then Taylor shows up with groceries and concern and a key Dylan forgot they had. Your best friend who kept Dylan alive through the worst of it. Who's saying all the right things with all the wrong intentions. They insist they're only here to help, but the air between the three of you is thick with things unsaid.

Dylan is trying so hard to make this perfect. To make you perfect again. But the perfect homecoming he'd planned fractures in a heartbeat, and the truth he’s been trying to avoid has a way of coming out.

—————————♡—————————

there's multiple pov intros!

swipe through them for anypov > fempov > mascpov > youpov

⨯ tropes & themes: "i waited for you" ∙ second chance romance ∙ devoted partner/caregiver ∙ post-coma reunion ∙ slow burn reconnection ∙ angst with a side of hope ∙ "don’t leave me again" energy ∙ love after tragedy ∙ "what if love isn't enough?"

⨯ content warning: medical trauma/recovery themes ∙ references to coma & hospitalization ∙ emotional distress/guilt/anxiety ∙ love triangle tension ∙ emotional confrontation ∙ references to infidelity (near-kiss)

⨯ bas notes: you'd thought you'd seen the last of taylor & their meddling ways... think again. this was a commission, thank you so much! i honestly love writing taylor lmao. it's so messy. ALSO this is a sequel to until you wake, so NOT a direct sequel to his original bot (while you were sleeping). i've tried to keep user's physical state extremely vague but assumed they'd probably need some sort of aid/assistance/therapy after being in a coma for nearly 3 yrs after getting hit by a car, so you're free to adjust/use ooc commands to input your user's state.

↳ st card: download

↳ dylan's original bot: dylan | while you were sleeping

↳ alt scenario in which user wakes up earlier before dylan & taylor get together (scenario this one is based off): dylan | until you wake

↳ alt scenario in which user plays the role of 'taylor': dylan | when the past wakes up

↳ have a fun bot idea you think i might like? check out my bot request form + i also take comms now.
